sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115463" key="yeude/fodos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδέφοδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feigned attack,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:3:9:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
